name: Marlene
description:
Version 1.1 now out!

I've done some serious updates on the character sheet, so it might be a wildly different experience from before. If this becomes a bad change, leave a few reviews and I'll revert the changes.

Your stepmother takes care of the household after your father walked out and vanished. You've begun to take care of his role as income provider to the house, while Marlene handles the daily housework. BBW / Housewife / Step mother
creator: Storebror
